mods.name: Fallout 4 Script Extender (F4SE)
mods.notes: Mandatory: Used for nearly all F4SE plugins, Recommended for all users

mods.name: Buffout 4
mods.notes: Crash-/Memory-/Engine-Fixes, Basis for Stability, Recommended for all users

mods.name: Address Library for F4SE Plugins
mods.notes: Mandatory: Required by most F4SE plugins to locate game functions/addresses

mods.name: High FPS Physics Fix
mods.notes: Prevents physics bugs at framerates above 60 FPS

mods.name: Baka ScrapHeap
mods.notes: Increases available memory heap, reduces crashes in large sessions

mods.name: Canary Save File Monitor
mods.notes: Warns about save file corruption before it becomes a problem

mods.name: Unofficial Fallout 4 Patch
mods.notes: Community-maintained collection of fixes for vanilla bugs missed by official patches

mods.name: Community Fixes Merged
mods.notes: Merged collection of individual community bugfix mods not covered by UFO4P

mods.name: Previsibines Repair Pack (PRP)
mods.notes: Repairs broken precombines/previsibines, major performance improvement especially in Boston

mods.name: Extended Dialogue Interface (XDI)
mods.notes: Extends dialogue menu functionality, required by several UI mods including FallUI

mods.name: Mod Configuration Menu (MCM)
mods.notes: In-game settings menu framework, required by many mods for configuration. Verify version matches game 1.10.163, not Next-Gen builds.

mods.name: LooksMenu
mods.notes: Mandatory: Character/face editor overhaul, required by many appearance mods. Verify version matches game 1.10.163, not Next-Gen builds.

mods.name: FallUI - Inventory
mods.notes: Redesigned inventory menu with sorting, icons and filtering

mods.name: FallUI - HUD
mods.notes: Highly configurable HUD with in-game layout manager

mods.name: FallUI - Map
mods.notes: Overhauled world/local map with better markers, search and readability

mods.name: FallUI - Workbench
mods.notes: Redesigned crafting/workbench menus with larger display and comparison columns

mods.name: FIS - The NEW FallUI Item Sorter
mods.notes: Official item sorting/tagging system for FallUI Inventory, HUD and Workbench

mods.name: Better Console - F4SE
mods.notes: Improved developer console with detailed target info. Confirmed compatible with game version 1.10.163

mods.name: ENBSeries (Fallout 4 binary)
mods.notes: Base graphics injector by Boris Vorontsov, required by all ENB presets. Not hosted on Nexus. v0.496 reported as most broadly compatible with existing presets; v0.501 has known issues with water/SSS/fog. Check which binary version the chosen preset (NAC X) was built for.

mods.name: NAC X - Natural and Atmospheric Commonwealth
mods.notes: Combined weather overhaul and ENB preset

mods.name: Fallout 4 HD Overhaul
mods.notes: HD texture overhaul (1K-8K) covering base game and DLCs, by luxor8071

mods.name: SavrenX HD Vanilla Landscape
mods.notes: Enhanced vanilla landscape/terrain textures with restored depth and detail

mods.name: SavrenX HD 1K Buildings and Interior
mods.notes: 1K building/interior textures, optimized to be smaller than vanilla while looking sharper

mods.name: SavrenX Landscape Interior Building DLC
mods.notes: DLC counterpart to Landscape/Buildings packs, covering Far Harbor, Nuka-World and Automatron. Verify exact DLC coverage on the mod page.

mods.name: SavrenX HD Settlement and Clutters
mods.notes: Enhanced settlement objects and clutter items (furniture, signs, workbenches, etc.). DLC version bundled on same mod page.

mods.name: SavrenX HD Vanilla Armor
mods.notes: Enhanced vanilla armor textures, capped at 2K for performance on high-spawn items

mods.name: SavrenX HD Vanilla Clothes
mods.notes: Enhanced vanilla clothing textures

mods.name: SavrenX HD DLC Armor and Clothes
mods.notes: Armor and clothing textures for Far Harbor, Automatron and Nuka-World

mods.name: SavrenX Power Armor HD DLC
mods.notes: Enhanced Power Armor textures for DLC armor sets. Details unverified beyond mod name/ID, check page directly.

mods.name: SavrenX Weapon HD DLC
mods.notes: Enhanced weapon textures for DLC weapons. Details unverified beyond mod name/ID, check page directly.

mods.name: SavrenX Creature Pack DLC REDONE
mods.notes: Enhanced creature textures for base game and DLC, excluding Deathclaw/Ghoul/Robot

mods.name: SavrenX Organic Gore
mods.notes: Enhanced gore/dismemberment textures. Details unverified beyond mod name/ID, check page directly.

mods.name: SavrenX Organic Super Mutant
mods.notes: Enhanced Super Mutant skin textures. Details unverified beyond mod name/ID, check page directly.

mods.name: SavrenX Super Mutant Armor HD
mods.notes: Enhanced Super Mutant armor/gear textures. Details unverified beyond mod name/ID, check page directly.

mods.name: Boston Natural Surroundings
mods.notes: Adds dense forest vegetation across the Commonwealth. Designed to preserve precombines when enabled correctly per mod page instructions.

mods.name: Enhanced Lights and FX (ELFX)
mods.notes: Atmospheric interior lighting overhaul

mods.name: ELFX - PreVis PreCombine Patch
mods.notes: Regenerates precombines for ELFX, includes PRP-compatible fixes. Important for compatibility with our PRP setup.

mods.name: Interiors Enhanced - Darker Ambient Light and Fog
mods.notes: Reduces ambient light/fog in unlit interior corners, complements ELFX rather than replacing it

mods.name: Unlimited Fast Travel - F4SE
mods.notes: Removes fast travel restrictions (interior, survival mode, overweight, combat, etc.)

mods.name: QuickTrade Redux
mods.notes: Adds quick trade/inventory access to merchants, settlers and companions without dialogue menus. Enhanced fork of the original QuickTrade mod

mods.name: Place Everywhere
mods.notes: Removes settlement building placement restrictions (red highlighting), makes scrap-only objects movable. Confirmed compatible with game version 1.10.163

mods.name: Unlimited Fast Travel - F4SE
mods.notes: Removes fast travel restrictions (interior, survival mode, overweight, combat, etc.)

mods.name: Faster Terminal Displays
mods.notes: Speeds up terminal text display (choice of 2x-100x). Simple, low-risk ESP with no known conflicts

mods.name: Simple Everyone's Best Friend
mods.notes: Allows Dogmeat plus a standard companion simultaneously. Modern rewrite of the original mod with better compatibility, integrated UFO4P fixes, and compatibility with Survival Configuration Menu

mods.name: Workshop Framework
mods.notes: Mandatory dependency for Sim Settlements 2. Opens settlement system for community modding, faster/more stable workshop scripts

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2
mods.notes: Main quest and settlement gameplay overhaul, Chapter 1

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Chapter 2
mods.notes: Continues SS2 story, adds 3 new side questlines

mods.name: Sim Settlements 2 - Chapter 3
mods.notes: Concludes SS2 story, settlement warfare content

mods.name: Atomic Radio and Tales from the Commonwealth
mods.notes: Large quest/companion/settler mod plus radio station. Incomplete previs data on its own, see companion patches

mods.name: Tales from the Commonwealth - Precombined Visibility Patch
mods.notes: Adds missing previs/precombine data to Tales from the Commonwealth cells

mods.name: Emirals Tales From The Commonwealth Fixes
mods.notes: Compatibility fixes for UFO4P and DLCs. Confirmed to work with game version 1.10.163

mods.name: America Rising 2 - Legacy of the Enclave
mods.notes: DLC-sized Enclave faction questline, successor to the original America Rising

mods.name: Fourville
mods.notes: New town/vault quest hub, ~10 hours of content, fully voiced

mods.name: Fourville - eXoPatch
mods.notes: Fixes visual glitches and quest bugs in Fourville

mods.name: The Machine and Her
mods.notes: DLC-sized quest with fully voiced companion. Requires Far Harbor, Nuka-World and Automatron. Use with Revival replacer below

mods.name: The Machine and Her Revival
mods.notes: Community rebuild: cleaned cell headers, rebuilt navmesh, new previs/precombines, many bugfixes. Original still needed for texture archive

mods.name: Outcasts and Remnants - Quest Mod Plus
mods.notes: Large voiced quest mod, foundation for Project Valkyrie

mods.name: Project Valkyrie
mods.notes: Endgame-focused quest mod, uses Outcasts and Remnants as required master file

mods.name: Fusion City Rising
mods.notes: Large underground city quest mod, less strictly lore-friendly than others in this list

mods.name: Children of Ug-Qualtoth
mods.notes: Lore-friendly Lovecraftian horror dungeon quest with unique enemies and custom music

mods.name: Maxwell's World
mods.notes: DLC-sized horror quest in a haunted amusement park, multiple endings. Conflicts with XDI without patch below

mods.name: Maxwell's World XDI Patch
mods.notes: Required compatibility patch since our setup includes XDI

mods.name: Depravity - A Bit of Harmless Fun
mods.notes: Quest/companion mod by the Outcasts and Remnants/Project Valkyrie author, focused on morally darker player choices and an antagonist-leaning faction. Tonally different from the rest of this list
